description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with multiple interconnected rooms and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior is characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and lighting fixtures. The structure includes a combination of private rooms, communal living spaces, and utility areas, all arranged on a single level. The windows are large and asymmetrically placed, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is defined by a covered porch area with steps leading up to the door, flanked by outdoor lamps and a bench. The overall design emphasizes functionality, openness, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and an open patio area featuring outdoor seating and lighting. The design is clean and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and natural light.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, showing the patio area with outdoor seating, lighting fixtures, and a covered section adjacent to the main living spaces.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the large, floor-to-ceiling windows and the open-plan interior, as well as the main entryway with steps and a covered porch.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of windows and doors, with visible lighting fixtures and a bench near the entry.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side of the house, with additional windows, a secondary entrance, and more of the outdoor living area, including a small garden feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with covered porch, steps, outdoor lighting, and a bench, featuring a minimalist modern door.
